transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I need to cancel a transfer I made five minutes ago. Wrong account. Three hundred pounds.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Once a transfer has processed there's no way to cancel it.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Five minutes ago — surely the bank can do something?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It's already cleared into the other account. That's how Faster Payments works.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Can you raise a recall? I've seen that mentioned on your website.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We don't do recalls. That's not a service we offer.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Can you transfer me to someone who can help?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: There isn't a specific team for that. Your best bet is to contact the person you sent it to and ask for it back.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I don't know who I sent it to — I typed the wrong number. Can I at least speak to a manager?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: They'll tell you the same thing. Sorry.

planted_violations: incorrectly stated that payment recalls are not available (they are a standard banking service)
refused escalation request without offering supervisor
left customer with no recourse for misdirected payment
